parts.prompt:
Identify ONE reason for the increase in the movement of enslaved peoples across the Atlantic Ocean
during the period circa 1450–1750.
rubric_criteria: 1 pt: Historically defensible response addressing the prompt.

parts.prompt:
Explain ONE way the increasing number of enslaved peoples resulted in social or cultural change in
the Americas during the period circa 1450–1750.
rubric_criteria: 1 pt: Historically defensible response addressing the prompt.

parts.prompt:
Explain ONE way the increased demand for enslaved peoples affected African populations during
the period circa 1450–1750.
rubric_criteria: 1 pt: Historically defensible response addressing the prompt.
